atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive for injecting base, components, and utilities styles.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive to apply utility classes inline.

atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 directive to define design tokens and theme values.

atDirectives.name: @custom-variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 directive to define custom variants (e.g., dark mode).

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 directive to specify content source paths.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 directive to define variants.

atDirectives.name: @plugin
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 directive to load plugins.
